label: 424_activity prices_policy japan_overseas economies_prices monetary
description: The Bank of Japan's Policy Board members discussed economic activity, prices, and monetary policy in speeches at meetings with local and business leaders. They addressed current developments and the impact of overseas economies on Japan.

earliest_articles.title: Yukitoshi Funo: Economic activity and prices in Japan, and monetary policy
earliest_articles.excerpt: of the slowdown in emerging economies, private consumption has been on an increasing trend, supported mainly by the improvement in the labor market. As for the outlook, the economy will likely continue to see a moderate recovery, mainly on the back of the improved employment and income situation under accommodative…
